case_title: NGO, LAM vs. LEONARD MILLER et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGO, LAM AS TO DEFENDANT LEONARD MILLER DBA LEONARD'S PHOTOGRAPHY STUDIO AND CLUB ALESIS MILLER DBA LEONARD'S PHOTOGRAPHY STUDIO AND CLUB DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER AND ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGO, LAM
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEONARD MILLER DBA LEONARD'S PHOTOGRAPHY STUDIO AND CLUB
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGO, LAM COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-26-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEONARD MILLER DBA LEONARD'S PHOTOGRAPHY STUDIO AND CLUB ALESIS MILLER DBA LEONARD'S PHOTOGRAPHY STUDIO AND CLUB THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1742 FILLMORE ST.(OFFICE ON 2ND FL), S.F, CA., IF DEF. VACATES AS AGREED, PL. WILL WAIVE BACK RENT OF $9224.96. KEYS MUST BE RETURNED TO VACATE AT 1732 FILLMORE LAW OFF. OF CHIN & HITCHCOCK. PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR ATTY FEES & COSTS. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
